programme.title: World Of Watersports Ep303: Profile of Professional Kayaker Adrian Mattern
programme.desc: Extreme Kayaking is a way of life for Germany's Adrian Mattern. The attraction for Adrian is to get to know new places, cultures and people on every expedition, as well as mastering the extreme mental and physical challenges. Adrian's always looking for new spots on the world map: new rivers and waterfalls, new techniques and styles and he's always thinking "outside the box".

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River
programme.desc: World-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. Steeped in the brotherhood of kayaking, Fisher, and his fellow paddlers, run head-on into some of the most radical rapids ever recorded

programme.title: Hot Water Ep121: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Round 2 from Portimao, Portugal, where the mighty Atlantic meets the graceful Arade River, in a country with an illustrious and glorious maritime history, where the waves crash and the sprays soar, the second round of the UIM F1H2O season kicks off.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep411: Tahiti
programme.desc: Host Nikki Gregg explores the turquoise waters and breathtaking tropical islands of French Polynesia on her stand-up paddleboard.

programme.title: World Of Watersports Ep303: Profile of Professional Kayaker Adrian Mattern
programme.desc: Extreme Kayaking is a way of life for Germany's Adrian Mattern. The attraction for Adrian is to get to know new places, cultures and people on every expedition, as well as mastering the extreme mental and physical challenges. Adrian's always looking for new spots on the world map: new rivers and waterfalls, new techniques and styles and he's always thinking "outside the box".

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7
programme.desc: In this new episode of Sail-Ho we are visiting Dugi Otok, the longest and biggest island of the Zadar archipelago. It is also the 2nd most indented island in all of the Adriatic Sea, with gorgeous beaches and beautiful nature we believe is worth exploring completely. Come join us in this new adventure!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: Welcome to Sail-Ho Croatia! We're in Rab, the island known by many as the island of love and happiness since Roman times. It has more than 30 sandy beaches, 2500 hours of sunshine and a mouthwatering gastronomy. Come join us and find out why this place is considered a happy place by so many!

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. Rowing boats, lightships, classic sailing ships... almost 6000 sailors will take part in this year's edition. This joyful week has been organised in order to meet and share new experiences, so let's enduge in the best moments, most impressive boats and latest news of the 7th edition of the Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan!

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Palma de Mallorca
programme.desc: Welcome to the 51st Trofeo Princesa Sofía regatta in Palma de Mallorca! More than a thousand of accomplished sailing athletes compete in the first Hempel World Cup Series regatta of the new Olympic cycle. As the start of the European racing season, a great sense of urgency and enthusiasm can be felt among competitors, and as a vital event, we are eager to see how their training has gone over the winter.

programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Let Me Show You The Door
programme.desc: If the enemy has been attacking you, then you’re probably headed into a season of greater impact. Pastor Steven Furtick equips us to shut the devil down God’s way in “Let Me Show You The Door.”

programme.title: God Can Use This Too
programme.desc: Just because you didn’t choose it, doesn’t mean God won’t use it. Start to view the challenges and obstacles you face through the lens of God’s limitless creativity.

programme.title: God Will Work It In!
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn’t getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He’s already given you what you need — and He’ll help you work it in to what you’re facing.

programme.title: God Gave It To Me
programme.desc: God has given you everything you need for the battle you’re facing. When you refocus on Him rather than what He’s given you, He sustains you through weariness to bring you to victory.

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don’t let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what’s next.

programme.title: You Don't Have To
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by the pressure of obstacles and obligations? Shift your attention from how you’ll get through it to Who will get you through it. You’re not alone, God is with you.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
